sha_convention: sha256 over on-disk raw bytes (binary read, no line-ending normalization) — the convention file_sha256 is pinned against
gate_rework: PR #143 changes-requested (option b): wrapper consumes the sft arm's exact view sha-pinned; t2_mtp read-only consume + build-time pin assert + certified-sft-receipt cross-check (rows, n_examples) -> identity claim TRUE in both receipts, by construction
default_path_unchanged: no --view-path = legacy round-1 behavior (regenerate wcode-r1.jsonl from ledger, arm-A-identical build)
quarantine_note: adapter r2-q3-mtp stays PRE-GATE/QUARANTINED until rerun on the sft-identical view — dispatch is the gate-holder's call
